book_claims.claim: Used as a finishing ingredient in Ligurian minestrone and rice dishes.

supplementary_research.finding: Basil-pine nut pesto retains 70-80% of basil's rosmarinic acid after preparation; the olive oil matrix protects polyphenols from oxidation.
Regular consumption of basil and garlic reduces CRP and IL-6; combined allicin + rosmarinic acid shows additive anti-inflammatory effects.

nutrient_highlights.bioavailability_notes: Well-absorbed polyphenol; inhibits NF-kB, reducing inflammation; neuroprotective in aging models
Formed when garlic is crushed; absorbed in small intestine; antimicrobial and cardioprotective
Dominant fatty acid in pesto; anti-inflammatory, improves fat-soluble phytonutrient absorption

synergies.description: Olive oil in pesto slows starch digestion, lowering the glycemic response; polyphenols add anti-inflammatory benefit
Pesto's allicin and rosmarinic acid extend the anti-inflammatory profile of vegetable-legume soup
Basil's rosmarinic acid and fish's omega-3s together reduce oxidative stress via complementary mechanisms
